recommendations.title: Wish Upon
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl discovers a box with magical powers, but those powers comes with a deadly price.

recommendations.title: The Silence
recommendations.overview: With the world under attack by deadly creatures who hunt by sound, a teen and her family seek refuge outside the city and encounter a mysterious cult.

recommendations.title: Annabelle
recommendations.overview: A couple begins to experience terrifying supernatural occurrences involving a vintage doll shortly after their home is invaded by satanic cultists.

recommendations.title: Wolves at the Door

recommendations.title: The Butterfly Effect

recommendations.title: Mortal Kombat: Annihilation
recommendations.overview: A group of heroic warriors has only six days to save the planet in "Mortal Kombat Annihilation." To succeed they must survive the most spectacular series of challenges any human, or god, has ever encountered as they battle an evil warlord bent on tak

recommendations.title: Your Eyes Tell
recommendations.overview: A tragic accident lead to Akari's blindness, but she clings to life and the smaller pleasures it can still afford her. She meets Rui and begins to talk to him. Rui was once a promising kickboxer, but something happened in his past. Akari's smile brin

recommendations.title: Test
recommendations.overview: Kurt Longson tries to avenge his daughters death. To succeed he has to battle with his conscience and morality to realize true love.

recommendations.title: Promising Young Woman
recommendations.overview: A young woman, traumatized by a tragic event in her past, seeks out vengeance against those who crossed her path.

recommendations.title: La Jetée
recommendations.overview: A man confronts his past during an experiment that attempts to find a solution to the problems of a post-apocalyptic world caused by a world war.
